title: Greeting and Introducing Yourself
prompt: Greet someone and introduce yourself in English.
hint: Start with a greeting like 'Good morning' and say your name.
sample: Good morning! My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

ja.prompt: 誰かに挨拶して自己紹介してください。
ja.hint: 'Good morning'のような挨拶から始めて、自分の名前を言いましょう。
ja.sample: Good morning! My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

zh.prompt: 用英文向某人打招呼並自我介紹。
zh.hint: 以「Good morning」等問候語開始，並說出你的名字。
zh.sample: Good morning! My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

title: Asking and Answering About Objects
prompt: Ask and answer questions about objects using 'What's this?' and 'It's a...'.
hint: Use 'What's this?' to ask about an object and answer with 'It's a...'
sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

ja.prompt: 'What's this?'を使って物について質問し、'It's a...'で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'What's this?'で物を尋ね、'It's a...'で答えましょう。
ja.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

zh.prompt: 用「What's this?」詢問物品，並用「It's a...」回答。
zh.hint: 用「What's this?」問物品，回答時用「It's a...」。
zh.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

title: Talking About Daily Routines
prompt: Talk about what time you get up and go to school.
hint: Use 'I get up at...' and 'I go to school at...'.
sample: I get up at six. I go to school at seven thirty.

ja.prompt: 起きる時間と学校に行く時間について話してください。
ja.hint: 'I get up at...' と 'I go to school at...' を使いましょう。
ja.sample: I get up at six. I go to school at seven thirty.

zh.prompt: 談論你幾點起床和去學校。
zh.hint: 使用「I get up at...」和「I go to school at...」。
zh.sample: I get up at six. I go to school at seven thirty.

title: Describing Possessions
prompt: Ask and answer about ownership of objects using 'Whose ... is this?' and 'It's ...'s.'
hint: Use 'Whose ... is this?' to ask and 'It's ...'s.' to answer.
sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's bike.

ja.prompt: 'Whose ... is this?'で所有者を尋ね、'It's ...'s.'で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'Whose ... is this?'で質問し、'It's ...'s.'で答えましょう。
ja.sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's bike.

zh.prompt: 用「Whose ... is this?」詢問物品的擁有者，並用「It's ...'s.」回答。
zh.hint: 用「Whose ... is this?」問，回答時用「It's ...'s.」。
zh.sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's bike.

title: Talking About Abilities
prompt: Ask and answer if someone can do something using 'Can you ...?' and 'Yes, I can.' or 'No, I can't.'
hint: Use 'Can you ...?' to ask about ability and answer with 'Yes, I can.' or 'No, I can't.'
sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

ja.prompt: 'Can you ...?'で能力を尋ね、'Yes, I can.' または 'No, I can't.'で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'Can you ...?'で質問し、'Yes, I can.'か'No, I can't.'で答えましょう。
ja.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

zh.prompt: 用「Can you ...?」詢問某人是否能做某事，並用「Yes, I can.」或「No, I can't.」回答。
zh.hint: 用「Can you ...?」問能力，回答時用「Yes, I can.」或「No, I can't.」。
zh.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

title: Talking About Age
prompt: Ask and answer about someone's age using 'How old are you?' and 'I'm ... years old.'
hint: Use 'How old are you?' to ask and answer with 'I'm ... years old.'
sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

ja.prompt: 'How old are you?'で年齢を尋ね、'I'm ... years old.'で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'How old are you?'で質問し、'I'm ... years old.'で答えましょう。
ja.sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

zh.prompt: 用「How old are you?」詢問年齡，並用「I'm ... years old.」回答。
zh.hint: 用「How old are you?」問，回答時用「I'm ... years old.」。
zh.sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

title: Talking About Likes and Dislikes
prompt: Ask and answer about likes and dislikes using 'Do you like ...?' and 'Yes, I do.' or 'No, I don't.'
hint: Use 'Do you like ...?' to ask and answer with 'Yes, I do.' or 'No, I don't.'
sample: Do you like baseball? No, I don't. I like soccer.

ja.prompt: 'Do you like ...?'で好き嫌いを尋ね、'Yes, I do.' または 'No, I don't.'で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'Do you like ...?'で質問し、'Yes, I do.'か'No, I don't.'で答えましょう。
ja.sample: Do you like baseball? No, I don't. I like soccer.

zh.prompt: 用「Do you like ...?」詢問喜好，並用「Yes, I do.」或「No, I don't.」回答。
zh.hint: 用「Do you like ...?」問，回答時用「Yes, I do.」或「No, I don't.」。
zh.sample: Do you like baseball? No, I don't. I like soccer.

title: Asking for and Giving Directions
prompt: Ask for directions and give directions to a place.
hint: Use phrases like 'Excuse me, where is ...?' and 'Go straight and turn right/left.'
sample: Excuse me, where's the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

ja.prompt: 道を尋ねて、場所への道順を教えてください。
ja.hint: 'Excuse me, where is ...?'や'Go straight and turn right/left.'の表現を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Excuse me, where's the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

zh.prompt: 詢問路線並給出去某地的方向。
zh.hint: 使用「Excuse me, where is ...?」和「Go straight and turn right/left.」等句子。
zh.sample: Excuse me, where's the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

title: Talking About Weather and Clothing
prompt: Talk about the weather and what clothes to wear.
hint: Use phrases like 'It's cold and windy.' and 'Put on your coat.'
sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

ja.prompt: 天気と着る服について話してください。
ja.hint: 'It's cold and windy.'や'Put on your coat.'の表現を使いましょう。
ja.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

zh.prompt: 談論天氣和穿什麼衣服。
zh.hint: 使用「It's cold and windy.」和「Put on your coat.」等句子。
zh.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

title: Talking About School Subjects and Hobbies
prompt: Talk about your favorite school subject and hobbies.
hint: Use 'My favorite subject is ...' and 'I like ...' to talk about interests.
sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like playing basketball.

ja.prompt: 好きな教科や趣味について話してください。
ja.hint: 'My favorite subject is ...'や'I like ...'を使いましょう。
ja.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like playing basketball.

zh.prompt: 談論你喜歡的學科和興趣。
zh.hint: 使用「My favorite subject is ...」和「I like ...」來表達興趣。
zh.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like playing basketball.
